name: Catfish and Crawfish Mold
recipeInstructions:
1. Chop catfish and crawfish in a food processor.
2. Add wine, chopped parsley, lemon juice, and salt to the mixture. Mix well.
3. Stir in Louisiana hot sauce and Lea & Perrins Worcestershire sauce.
4. Fold in cream cheese until fully incorporated.
5. Transfer the mixture into a mold and refrigerate overnight.
6. Serve with crackers or on a bed of lettuce. Shrimp can be used if crawfish is unavailable.
